section_name: Vehicles Not Subject to Inspection Program Replacement Fee

subsections.text: Section 548.510 (Fee for Certain Exempted Vehicles; Collection of Fee During Registration) does not apply to:
a vehicle that is being registered under the International Registration Plan as authorized by Section 502.091 (International Registration Plan) ;

a token trailer that is being registered under Section 502.255 (Truck-tractor or Commercial Motor Vehicle Combination Fee; Semitrailer Token Fee) , including a token trailer that is being registered for an extended period under Section 502.0023 (Extended Registration of Commercial Fleet Vehicles) ;
a vehicle that is issued a permit under Section 502.094 and is described by Section 502.094 (e)(1) or (2);
a former military vehicle that is issued a specialty license plate under Section 504.502 (Certain Exhibition Vehicles) ;
a log loader vehicle that is issued a specialty license plate under Section 504.506 (Log Loader Vehicles) ;

farm machinery, road-building equipment, a farm trailer, or a vehicle required to display a slow-moving-vehicle emblem under Section 547.703 (Additional Equipment Requirements for Slow-moving Vehicles) ;
a commercial motor vehicle that is required to be inspected under Subchapter D or that is subject to fees under Section 548.203 (Exemptions) (c);
a vehicle that is being registered under Section 548.256 (Proof of Compliance with Inspection Requirements Required to Register Vehicle) (b);
a neighborhood electric vehicle, as defined by Section 551.301 (Definition) ;
a trailer, semitrailer, pole trailer, or mobile home that:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: has an actual gross weight or registered gross weight of 4,500 pounds or less; or

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: will move under or bear a factory-delivery license plate or in-transit license plate;

a vehicle that will move under or bear a paper dealer in-transit tag, machinery license, disaster license, parade license, prorate tab, one-trip permit, vehicle temporary transit permit, antique license, custom vehicle license, street rod license, temporary 24-hour permit, or permit license; or
a vehicle qualified for a tax exemption under Section 152.092 (Motor Vehicles Transported out of State) , Tax Code.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 851 (H.B.3297), Sec. 22, eff. January 1, 2025.
